name: positive regulation of cardiac muscle tissue growth
description: "Any process that activates, maintains or increases the frequency, rate or extent of cardiac muscle growth." [GOC:vk]

name: positive regulation of cellular process
description: "Any process that activates or increases the frequency, rate or extent of a cellular process, any of those that are carried out at the cellular level, but are not necessarily restricted to a single cell. For example, cell communication occurs among more than one cell, but occurs at the cellular level." [GOC:jid]

name: Factor: Foxn1; motif: RGAMGC; match class: 1
description: Factor: Foxn1; motif: RGAMGC; match class: 1

name: positive regulation of heart growth
description: "Any process that increases the rate or extent of heart growth. Heart growth is the increase in size or mass of the heart." [GOC:BHF, GOC:dph, GOC:tb]

name: cell population proliferation
description: "The multiplication or reproduction of cells, resulting in the expansion of a cell population." [GOC:mah, GOC:mb]

name: neutrophil mediated immunity
description: "Any process involved in the carrying out of an immune response by a neutrophil." [GO_REF:0000022, GOC:add, ISBN:0781735149]

name: nucleoplasm
description: "That part of the nuclear content other than the chromosomes or the nucleolus." [GOC:ma, ISBN:0124325653]

name: positive regulation of biological process
description: "Any process that activates or increases the frequency, rate or extent of a biological process. Biological processes are regulated by many means; examples include the control of gene expression, protein modification or interaction with a protein or substrate molecule." [GOC:jid]

name: Abnormal B cell morphology
description: A structural abnormality of B cells.

name: positive regulation of organ growth
description: "Any process that activates or increases the frequency, rate or extent of growth of an organ of an organism." [GOC:bf, GOC:tb]
